items.briefing:
A new report highlights that organisations are falling behind on vulnerability testing — meaning security weaknesses are going undetected for longer, leaving systems exposed. This is a timely reminder for RTOs to ensure regular checks are in place for their student and staff systems. Separately, scammers are increasingly impersonating celebrities and public figures to steal money, a tactic now described as a billion-dollar industry — staff and students should be cautious of unexpected messages or requests from seemingly well-known people online.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unsolicited message from a celebrity or unfamiliar contact asking for money or personal details, don't engage — report it to your manager or IT team immediately.
